name: AI Assistant SaaS

prompt: Create an AI assistant SaaS with database support, member login, and hosted checkout.

home.headline: Charge for your assistant before you scale your agent stack.
home.description: SignalDesk AI is a payment-ready SaaS shell for private assistants, premium copilots, and member-only workflows.

Hosted checkout for monthly or annual access
Neon-backed schema layer for threads, credits, and seats

pricing.headline: Unlock the assistant for
pricing.description: One subscription. Faster answers. Team-ready workflows.
pricing.defaultProductDescription: Unlimited assistant access for your team.

templateSurface.headline: Turn this starter into a paid assistant product.
templateSurface.description: Replace the marketing layer with your workflow, then connect billing events to credits, seats, or premium tools.
bullets: Model conversations, credits, and tool runs in your database
Grant assistant entitlements after successful checkout
Swap the placeholder UI for your chat workspace
